segments.text: This fighter's been losing the last few games, but their platform advantage is extending, damage is extending - now they're juggling!
segments.original_text: 泣かされているファイターは数シリーズというところですがさあ台上有利が伸びる 火力が伸びるさあ着地狩り

segments.text: So with that back action, they've got the advantage!
segments.original_text: さあ後釣行動にあの有利

full_text: This fighter's been losing the last few games, but their platform advantage is extending, damage is extending - now they're juggling! So with that back action, they've got the advantage!

corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 大抵有価値→台上有利
misheard: 着地があり→着地狩り
